layers.name: Utility Layer
layers.description: Shared utilities, helpers, and common libraries

layers.name: Background Tasks
layers.description: Background workers, job processors, and scheduled tasks

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: Data models, database access, and persistence

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: HTTP endpoints, route handlers, and API clients

tour.title: 项目总览
tour.description: 从说明、部署配置和主要入口理解项目的整体边界。

tour.title: Core
tour.description: Core application files。该步骤聚焦 Dockerfile, Dockerfile, Dockerfile, Dockerfile, ADR-FORMAT.md, CONTEXT-FORMAT.md, SKILL.md, impeccable_asset_producer.toml 等文件。

tour.title: Test Layer
tour.description: Test files and test utilities。该步骤聚焦 2026-06-05-asr-settings-design.md, 2026-06-05-audit-log-management-design.md, 2026-06-06-login-command-center-design.md, 2026-06-11-default-employee-access-design.md, 2026-06-16-agent-application-studio-design.md, 2026-06-16-agent-conversation-settings-design.md, __init__.py, test_agent_application_api.py 等文件。

tour.title: Utility Layer
tour.description: Shared utilities, helpers, and common libraries。该步骤聚焦 color.mjs, constants.mjs, page.mjs, design-parser.mjs, impeccable-paths.mjs, is-generated.mjs 等文件。

tour.title: Background Tasks
tour.description: Background workers, job processors, and scheduled tasks。该步骤聚焦 SKILL.md 等文件。

tour.title: Data Layer
tour.description: Data models, database access, and persistence。该步骤聚焦 __init__.py, 0001_initial.py, 0002_alter_accountapplication_phone.py, 0003_role_menu_permissionpoint_userrole.py, 0004_menu_parent.py, 0005_accountapplication_username.py, 0006_remove_accountapplication_email_and_more.py, 0007_accountuser.py 等文件。

tour.title: Service Layer
tour.description: Business logic and application services。该步骤聚焦 __init__.py, notifications.py, permissions.py, __init__.py, agent_knowledge.py, asr.py, tts.py, __init__.py 等文件。

tour.title: Configuration Layer
tour.description: Application configuration and environment settings。该步骤聚焦 __init__.py, AGENTS.md, asgi.py, business_cache.py, celery.py, exceptions.py, pagination.py, realtime.py 等文件。

tour.title: API Layer
tour.description: HTTP endpoints, route handlers, and API clients。该步骤聚焦 AGENTS.md, client.ts, applications.ts, asr.ts, audit.ts, auth.ts, chat.ts, commands.ts 等文件。
